name: triprender
description: Mapbox route finder — Tauri shell for desktop and mobile

scripts.dev:server: node scripts/free-port-1420.js && node build.js && npx serve dist -l 1420
scripts.tauri:ios:sim: node scripts/ensure-simulator-booted.js "iPhone 16" && node scripts/tauri-with-rustup.js ios dev iPhone 16
